session: P0 Fix Session - Langfuse v4 API Compatibility & Test Coverage

blockers_resolved.description: Langfuse v4 removed .trace() method from client, causing AttributeError in langfuse_client.py:116
blockers_resolved.solution: Rewrote langfuse_client.py using v4 APIs: start_as_current_observation() for context managers, @observe decorator for function tracing
files_modified: tests/conftest.py (disable Langfuse in tests, speed up LiteLLM imports)

sprint_a_p1_status.note: All P1 deliverables ready for execution

known_issues.test_performance: Per-test latency ~4-5s due to LiteLLM model cost map fetch at import time (DNS resolution fails). LITELLM_LOCAL_MODEL_COST_MAP set in conftest but not fully effective.

next_steps: Fix LiteLLM import performance (set LITELLM_LOCAL_MODEL_COST_MAP earlier or use litellm.disable_model_cost_map())
Add non-mock path tests for extract.py, synthesize.py, quality_check.py to achieve ≥85% coverage
Run full test suite with coverage after performance fix
